action_items.task: Text mom to confirm she will pick up the kids on Thursday
action_items.context: To ensure childcare coverage so the client can attend her appointment.

action_items.task: Bring first Sysco paystub to the office visit

critical_updates.details: Client started a new job at Sysco with early morning hours and is awaiting background check clearance. She quit her job at La Quinta last week but retained weekend shifts at Denny's as a safety net.
Client is compliant; she paid fifty dollars toward her court fees this month and her completion certificate from Axiom classes was received.
Client's mother continues to provide critical childcare support in the mornings and will handle school pickup on Thursday due to her clinic being closed.
Client is without a personal vehicle, needing eight hundred dollars to get her car out of the shop. She is currently relying heavily on the bus system for her commute.

acceptable_action_items.task: Obtain $800 to get the car out of the shop.
acceptable_action_items.context: Client self-description of her financial goal, not a PO directive.

acceptable_action_items.task: Continue working at Sysco and maintain weekend shifts at Denny's.
acceptable_action_items.context: Client-stated employment plan. PO acknowledged but did not direct.

next_episode_context: Client is compliant with supervision, having paid fifty dollars toward court fees and completed her Axiom classes. She recently started a new job at Sysco (background check pending) and is maintaining weekend shifts at Denny's after quitting La Quinta. She currently relies on the bus system while needing $800 for car repairs. Client is scheduled to attend her next office visit on Thursday the 12th at 3:00 PM, with her mother assisting with childcare.
